reviews.comment:
Los surtidores llenos y solamente dos playeros,sobrepasados,se le descalzó el pico del surtidor,se dió cuenta el muchacho de adentro quien lo paró,a todo esto era un mar de NAFTA debajo del auto,me dijo que mi auto estaba atravesado y no era eso,me cobró al voleo,y en la próxima carga sacamos la conclusión que le erró feo,o ponen más empleados o les enseñan a cobrar en estos casos

(Translated by Google)
The pumps were full and there were only two attendants, overwhelmed. The nozzle of the pump came loose, the guy inside noticed and stopped it. All this time there was a sea of ​​gasoline under the car. He told me my car was blocking the lane, which wasn't the case. He charged me randomly, and at the next fill-up we concluded that he made a big mistake. They either need to hire more employees or train them to charge properly in these situations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3MnNPbld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es increíble tener que perder tiempo de hasta dos horas o más en hacer cola para cargar combustible en el ACA Tinogasta.

(Translated by Google)
It's incredible to have to waste up to two hours or more waiting in line to fill up with fuel at the ACA Tinogasta.

reviews.comment:
Desastre total la falta de competencia hace que hagan lo que quieran 1 hora y media para cargar combustible. Es lamentable que el ACA LE PONGA EL SIMBOLO

(Translated by Google)
It's a total disaster. The lack of competition means they do whatever they want; it takes an hour and a half to fill up. It's deplorable that the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) is using the symbol.

reviews.comment:
Malisima YPF hora y media de demora.
Solo un playero en temporada alta.
Si pueden evitar cargar aca, le ganan un monton de tiempor al viaje.
No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Terrible YPF station, an hour and a half wait.
Only one attendant during peak season. If you can avoid filling up here, you'll save a lot of travel time. I don't recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Desastreee
La peor YPF del país
Siempre colas interminables (2 filas de más de cien metros cada una) para cargar combustible sabiendo que a muchos kilómetros no hay otra opción.
Se cagan en los clientes, pongan más playeros, los que están hacen lo que pueden
El libro de quejas no creo que sea el oficial y lo tuve que ir a pedir a una oficina

(Translated by Google)
Disaster!
The worst YPF in the country. Always endless lines (two lines over 100 meters each) to fill up, even though there's no other option for miles around. They don't give a damn about their customers. Hire more attendants; the ones they have are doing the best they can.
I don't think the complaint book is the official one, and I had to go to an office to get it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNidnBIdHZRRRAB

Las instalaciones en muy buenas condiciones limpio y ordenado

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza la atención. Podés tardar hasta 2hs para cargar combustible. Porque después de las 9pm solo dejan dos bombas funcionando de todas las que tienen. Ni vale la pena ser socio ya del aca

(Translated by Google)
The service is a disgrace. You can wait up to two hours to fill up. Because after 9 pm they only leave two pumps working out of all the ones they have. It's not even worth being a member anymore.

Very slow service; every time you go to charge it takes an hour or more.

reviews.comment:
Los chicos que atienden excelente.
El pan casero del shop riquísimo, para consumir ahí, pagos con transferencia o efectivo.
Para cargar nafta aceptan todos los medios de pago
Perooooo si vas a cargar hacelo con mucho mucho tiempo, tardan demasiado en cargar, estuvimos esperando una hora y media para cargar. Vayan hasta Fiambalá que hay una estación de servicio que si bien no es YPF, es nafta y gasoil de Ypf

(Translated by Google)
The staff are excellent.
The homemade bread at the shop is delicious; you can eat there. Payments can be made by bank transfer or cash.
They accept all forms of payment for gas. However, if you're going to fill up, allow plenty of time; they take forever to pump gas. We waited an hour and a half. Go to Fiambalá; there's a gas station there that, while not YPF, sells YPF gas and diesel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyNTczbWFREAE

reviews.comment:
Malisimo, tienen dos islas. En la isla que tienen infinia te hacen pagar en efectivo y en la otra solo tienen super. Haces la super cola y te enteras de eso al llegar. Son unos chantas

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. They have two islands. On the island with Infinia, they make you pay in cash, and on the other, they only have Super. You wait in a super long line and only find out when you arrive. They're scammers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyNTQyWGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los empleados y empleadas. Pero verdaderamente deberían pensar una organización mejor, empezando por poner más gente en la atención, ya que comparto la opinión que hay una sola persona atendiendo los surtidores. Por otro lado se arma embotellamiento y la gente de tránsito no te deja hacer la fila. Y te manda a que des la vuelta, o sea que tampoco podes hacer la fila. Casi nos multaron. Y por último deberían tener los QR en todos los surtidores, permitiendo que el.pago se más ágil. Esperemos volver y encontrarnos con resultados más beneficiosos para los y las turistas.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very helpful. However, they really need to reorganize, starting with hiring more people to attend to customers, as I agree that there's only one person manning the pumps. Furthermore, traffic jams form, and the traffic officers don't let you wait in line. They tell you to go around, so you can't wait in line either. We almost got a ticket. Finally, they should have QR codes at all the pumps, making payment faster. We hope to return and find better results for tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyd19LTnRBRRAB
